outfit_info.outfit_description: A chic ensemble features a vibrant patterned silk shirt paired with relaxed wide-leg olive pants. A black wool sweater draped over the shoulders adds sophistication, complemented by a sleek leather belt, loafers, and a structured tote bag. This creates an elegant, comfortable look suitable for a leisurely outing.

model_attributes.body: The model has a slender figure, presenting a calm, composed demeanor with elegant posture.
model_attributes.pose: Standing upright with one hand casually in a pant pocket, she gazes directly at the viewer with a neutral expression.
model_attributes.background: A misty, serene dockside scene features a moored sailboat and older men examining curios on a wooden table.

outfit.P01045238: green and white printed oversized silk shirt
